ScrollView.LinearLayout:
<EditText android:id="@+id/editTextSearch" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:hint="음식 이름을 입력하세요" android:inputType="text" android:background="@android:drawable/edit_text" <<<<<<< HEAD android:padding="12dp" android:fontFamily="@font/pretendard_medium" /> ======= android:padding="12dp" /> >>>>>>> 06810e8a6f8c10091a87e3e6215ebed5006c3388
<Button android:id="@+id/buttonSearch" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="검색" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:backgroundTint="@color/blue" <<<<<<< HEAD android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:fontFamily="@font/pretendard_semibold" /> ======= android:textColor="@android:color/white" /> >>>>>>> 06810e8a6f8c10091a87e3e6215ebed5006c3388
<TextView android:id="@+id/textViewResult" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:padding="12dp" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:text="결과가 여기에 표시됩니다." android:background="#EEEEEE" <<<<<<< HEAD android:textSize="16sp" android:fontFamily="@font/pretendard_medium" /> ======= android:textSize="16sp" /> >>>>>>> 06810e8a6f8c10091a87e3e6215ebed5006c3388
<EditText android:id="@+id/editTextGram" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:hint="섭취량(g)을 입력하세요" android:inputType="number" android:background="@android:drawable/edit_text" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" <<<<<<< HEAD android:padding="12dp" android:fontFamily="@font/pretendard_medium" /> ======= android:padding="12dp" /> >>>>>>> 06810e8a6f8c10091a87e3e6215ebed5006c3388
<Button android:id="@+id/buttonSave" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="섭취 정보 저장" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:backgroundTint="@color/teal_200" <<<<<<< HEAD android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:fontFamily="@font/pretendard_semibold" /> ======= android:textColor="@android:color/white" /> >>>>>>> 06810e8a6f8c10091a87e3e6215ebed5006c3388
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="최근 검색어" android:textSize="16sp" <<<<<<< HEAD android:layout_marginTop="24dp" android:paddingTop="8dp" android:fontFamily="@font/pretendard_semibold" /> ======= android:textStyle="bold" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" android:paddingTop="8dp" /> >>>>>>> 06810e8a6f8c10091a87e3e6215ebed5006c3388
<ListView android:id="@+id/recentListView" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:divider="@android:color/darker_gray" android:dividerHeight="1dp" android:paddingTop="4dp" <<<<<<< HEAD android:nestedScrollingEnabled="true" android:fontFamily="@font/pretendard_medium" /> ======= android:nestedScrollingEnabled="true" /> >>>>>>> 06810e8a6f8c10091a87e3e6215ebed5006c3388
